name: Flexible Finance
description_short: Flexible Finance offers payday and title loans at their New Orleans location, providing quick cash with no hidden fees and a simple application process.
description_long:
Flexible Finance operates as a direct lender offering short-term emergency cash solutions through payday and title loans. The company has a physical storefront located at 4221 Old Gentilly Road in New Orleans, with store hours Monday through Saturday (9 a.m.–6 p.m. weekdays, 9 a.m.–1 p.m. Saturday, closed Sunday). They position themselves as a transparent lender emphasizing direct lending, no hidden fees, and a straightforward application process.

The company offers two primary products: payday loans (short-term loans typically repaid on the borrower's next payday) and title loans (installment loans secured by vehicle titles, allowing borrowers to retain use of their vehicle). Both products are designed to provide quick access to cash for immediate financial needs. They also operate a referral program that pays existing and non-customers for successful referrals.

Flexible Finance distinguishes itself through its emphasis on transparency (no hidden fees claim), direct lending model (not a broker), and customer service reputation. Website customer reviews highlight specific staff members (T, Tiffany W.) for their politeness, patience, and problem-solving approach. The referral program is presented as a unique value proposition, allowing customers to earn money by recommending the service.

As an emergency-cash lender, Flexible Finance serves consumers facing immediate financial pressure but lacks publicly available information about APR rates, loan terms, maximum loan amounts, or credit requirements. The website provides no details about regulatory compliance, licensing status, or loan affordability metrics. Without this critical information, consumers cannot fully evaluate the true cost of borrowing or whether this lender complies with Louisiana lending regulations.
address: 4221 Old Gentilly Rd Ste B, New Orleans, LA 70126

company_info.headquarters: 4221 Old Gentilly Rd Ste B, New Orleans, LA 70126

pros: Direct lender (not a broker) with physical storefront at 4221 Old Gentilly Road in New Orleans
Advertises no hidden fees, emphasizing transparent pricing
Open Saturday mornings (9 a.m.–1 p.m.) for customer convenience
Specific positive customer reviews mentioning staff by name (T, Tiffany W.) for service quality
Referral program pays customers for bringing new business, even non-customers can participate
Offers title loans allowing customers to keep vehicle while borrowing against title
cons: No APR, interest rates, or loan terms disclosed on website—impossible to compare cost of borrowing
No information about maximum loan amounts, minimum credit score requirements, or eligibility criteria
Title loans carry high default risk for consumers unable to repay and risk vehicle repossession
No mention of licensing, regulatory oversight, or compliance with Louisiana lending laws
Limited physical availability (one New Orleans location only; no online application mentioned)
best_for: New Orleans-area residents facing immediate cash shortages before payday with reliable income
Vehicle owners needing larger cash amounts who are willing to use their car title as collateral
Consumers seeking in-person lending with face-to-face customer service rather than online-only lenders
diagnosis: Flexible Finance is best for New Orleans residents needing emergency cash who value in-person service and have a vehicle (for title loan options). The critical caveat is the complete absence of APR, interest rate, or fee information on their website—borrowers must call (504) 940-5555 to learn the actual cost of borrowing before committing, and should verify the lender's compliance with Louisiana's lending regulations.
services: Payday loans (short-term loans repaid on next payday)
Title loans (installment loans secured by vehicle title)
Customer service and support at physical location
Store hours Mon–Fri 9 a.m.–6 p.m., Sat 9 a.m.–1 p.m.
